no: Chosen of Mystra's Encounters The Gate Project fork:
a: Dark Raven, Magnus Thorenson, CoM Solaufein
sum: Adds new encounters and improvements to BG2, including improved Druid Grove druids, Underdark drow encounters, and an enhanced Shagbag encounter.
au: Raven, Magnus Thorenson and CoM Solaufein
